summary: P3: startup snapshot — db.backup() to ~/guru-backups/, integrity_check, manifest, prune to KEEP_BACKUPS=20, refuse-to-start on failure

resolution.note: db.backup() to BACKUP_DIR with integrity_check + JSON manifest. Refuses to boot on backup throw or integrity != 'ok'. Prune by mtime to KEEP_BACKUPS. Live boot canary matches pre-web-review baseline.
